_meta.purpose: Machine-readable catalogue of every host primitive the app builder can expose. Drives the builder's auto-generated config forms AND serves as the platform conformance audit ('did we expose every capability generically?'). The builder reads this; it does NOT hand-write per-primitive forms.
sourceOfTruth: redstars-frontend/src/lib/plugin-host/slots.tsx (isPrimitive() + renderPrimitive() — what the host ACTUALLY renders)
_meta.drift: capabilities.json (tools/fleet) lists only 7 of the 13 rendered primitives and is stale (contractVersion 0.3.0 vs core-ui SoT 0.15.0). The published @delminator/core-ui (0.7.0 pinned) lags the SoT, so primitives with inPublishedTypes=false must be wired with an `as unknown as` cast until republished.
_meta.todo: Auto-derive this file from primitives.ts via the TS compiler API so it never drifts. This hand-authored cut covers the NO-CODE surface (the fields the builder exposes); fields requiring app code are listed under `needsCode`.

noCodeLegend.full: Every interesting field is plain data → 100% buildable without app code (though may still need backend tables, see needsBackend).
noCodeLegend.partial: Display/config is no-code, but the high-value interactions (row detail, actions, custom blocks) need app code → eject.

dataSourceLegend.core: Core-owned per-org data (gateway → core). App provides NOTHING. Instantly usable.
dataSourceLegend.app-endpoint: Reads/writes the APP's own API → the builder must let the user declare ENTITIES (tables) and codegen migrations + the generic CRUD pod.
dataSourceLegend.mixed: Sources can point at core OR app endpoints.

fieldTypes.resource: name of an app entity/endpoint declared in the spec (drives codegen of a table + CRUD route)
fieldTypes.needsCode: EXCLUDED from the no-code builder — a function / React component / modal id. Listed so the builder can grey it out + offer 'eject to code'.

primitives.purpose: Shared product/service catalogue (prices, VAT). Core-owned per-org store.
Quotes workspace over the shared catalogue (HT/VAT/TTC, statuses). Core-owned.
Invoices workspace (create/convert quote, Swiss QR-bill PDF). Core-owned.
Cash register (entries, income/expense stats, multi-register). Core-owned.

quickActions.of: { label: localized, amount?: number, category?: string, paymentMethod?: enum(cash|check), transactionType?: enum(income|expense) }

primitives.purpose: Org member directory via the canonical UserCard (+ offline members, relations, scan).
Generic table over an APP entity + inline create form + row→detail modal.

columns.of: { key: string, label: localized, format?: enum(text|number|date), unitKey?: string }

createFields.note: { key, label, type: text|number|date|enum|select, required?, step?, options?[enum], source?{endpoint,valueKey,labelKey}[select] }

needsCode: rowOpensModal (app modal = the row detail/actions sheet)

primitives.purpose: Display-rich object-list superset: list⇄cards, search, filter chips, sort, selection, per-row actions.

filters.of: { key: string, label?: localized, options:[{value,label?,tone?}], multi?: boolean }

primitives.purpose: Uniform KPI grid + list blocks. KPIs/lists fetched from core or app endpoints.

kpis.of: { label: localized, icon?: string, source?: resource, query?: object, agg?: enum(count|sum), field?: string, core?: enum(members), sub?: localized, tone?: enum(accent|success|warning|error|info) }

blocks.note: { kind:'list', title, source: resource, query?, primary, secondary?, empty?, max?, span? }

needsCode: blocks of kind:'custom' (app React block component)

primitives.purpose: Config-driven settings page: pre-built CORE blocks (no code) + custom app blocks.

blocks.note: no-code core blocks: { kind: profile|wallet|scanner, title?, icon? }

needsCode: blocks of kind:'custom' (app settings block component)

primitives.purpose: Task board aggregating sources. Query sources (no-code) map an app endpoint's rows to task lines.

sources.note: { kind:'query', id, label, endpoint: resource, query?, item:{ title, sub?, tag: localized, tone?, toneBy?{key,map} }, rowOpensModal?, empty? }

primitives.purpose: Community page: announcements + optional events + month calendar. Generic CRUD over the app's endpoints.
Meta-slot: vertically stack several primitive slots under one menu entry.

alsoCode.comment: AppPlugin features that are inherently code (the eject boundary, NOT exposed by the no-code builder):
items: any custom business logic / extra pod routes / egress
